title: Coping with Cravings
text: Cravings are time-limited and often peak before fading. A practical response is to delay acting on the urge, leave high-risk settings, contact supportive people, and choose one grounding activity for the next 10 to 20 minutes.

title: Relapse Prevention Basics
text: Relapse prevention works best when people map triggers, rehearse coping responses, and make the safer choice easy to reach. Small actions like changing the environment, removing supplies, and planning a check-in can reduce the chance of acting on an urge.
